evidence_quotes.quote: dark patterns regulated by the law

paragraphs.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. In my view, such a law is essential to protect users, as we live today in a highly digitalised world and in continuous contact with technologies. Moreover, the protection of minors seems to me to be crucial, given that young people, under pressure from the digitalised world in which we live, start up in networks more and more soon. This may constitute a serious danger to them, as a child is a vulnerable person who can be easily vulnerable. As regards the dark patterns regulated by the law, it seems to me to be a great initiative to regulate them, and I consider that they should be sanctioned hardly, as they constitute a great detriment to the consumer.
